summary: A clip from a Fox News exclusive interview. A man in a dark suit and tie sits for an interview in a room with U.S. flags and a Department of Homeland Security seal behind him. The lower-third reads INTO THE FRAY, MULLIN TAKES HELM OF EMBATTLED AGENCY, with an EXCLUSIVE label and a BREAKING TONIGHT banner.

script.scene: A man in a suit speaks during an interview with U.S. flags and a DHS seal behind him; lower-third reads INTO THE FRAY, MULLIN TAKES HELM OF EMBATTLED AGENCY.
The interview continues in the same setting; EXCLUSIVE label visible.
The man continues speaking; the BREAKING TONIGHT banner remains.

notable_text: EXCLUSIVE; INTO THE FRAY; MULLIN TAKES HELM OF EMBATTLED AGENCY; BREAKING TONIGHT
